params.name: Lionheart
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Oct 24, AD 1190, Richard I acquired this item which was a symbol of kingship.

Legend has it that Richard I once put his hand in a lion's mouth and pulled out the lion's heart. This is where the name came from. He was the second king of the House of Plantagenet and one of the greatest kings in British history. It was a time when the spirit of knighthood was promoted and Richard had many followers. Both the noble and commoner class wanted to serve him as his knights. It is impressive that his  …
